articles.title: Need a quick clarification
articles.summary: I searched major news sources but could not find eight clearly important, high‑quality crypto stories from roughly the last 24 hours (Mar 29–30, 2026). Do you want me to (A) broaden the window to the last 72 hours, (B) include smaller outlets and press releases / company filings, or (C) focus on market/price moves (CoinGecko/Exchange data) only? Tell me which and I’ll fetch and deliver 8 SEO‑friendly summaries with links.
